https://townofkurebeach.org/news/blakesl.text:
BLAKESLEE AIR FORCE RECREATION AREA CONCERT SERIES
Jul 9, 2026
The Pleasure Island Chamber of Commerce is excited to present the 2026 Sunsets, Food Trucks, & Live Music Concert Series at Blakeslee Air Force Recreation Area. Thanks to the support of the Town of Kure Beach, this wonderful series is free and family-friendly. Pack your chairs and plan to join on the 2nd and 4th Friday of July, August, and September from 6:30-8:30 PM. Golf cart shuttle service...

NOTICE OF SPECIAL COMMITTEE MEETING NOTICE
Jul 9, 2026
This is official notice the Bike/Ped Committee will hold a Special meeting on Monday, July 13, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. at the Kure Beach Town Hall for the purpose of event planning for the Tour De Island.

https://townofkurebeach.org/news/town-ha.text:
TOWN HALL CLOSED FOR INDEPENDENCE HOLIDAY
Jul 1, 2026
Town Hall will be closed all day on Friday, July 3, 2026 for the Independence Holiday.

https://townofkurebeach.org/news/boardwa.text:
BOARDWALK DRAINAGE PROJECT UPDATE
Jun 29, 2026
The Boardwalk repairs are taking an additional day to complete and will continue through Monday, June 29, 2026. Please continue to avoid the boardwalk area while landscaping work is being completed. Thank you for your patience.

https://townofkurebeach.org/news/town-se.text:
TOWN SEEKING HURRICANE FRAN PHOTOS FOR 30TH ANNIVERSARY COMMEMORATION
Jun 25, 2026
As the 30th anniversary of Hurricane Fran approaches this September, the Town of Kure Beach is seeking photographs that capture the storm's impact on our community and the recovery efforts that followed. If you have photos from the aftermath of Hurricane Fran in Kure Beach, we invite you to share them with us. Images may be featured in anniversary exhibits or other commemorative projects...

https://townofkurebeach.org/news/island-.text:
ISLAND ARTS COUNCIL MOSAIC TOTEM PROJECT
Jun 24, 2026
Island Arts Council is thrilled to introduce a new public sculpture project that brings more colorful art across the island. The Pleasure Island Mosaic Totems Project is a public sculpture initiative that will install multiple hand-crafted mosaic totems throughout Pleasure Island. These sculptures will reflect the spirit, values, and identity of our community, including: Ocean stewardship...
